tasks.title: Core engine architecture and module layout
tasks.description: Design the Centurion engine hierarchy: Engine → Legion → Century → Legionary with K8s-inspired resource scheduling, EventBus, and plugin agent types.
acceptance_criteria: Architecture document covers hierarchy mapping (Roman → Centurion → K8s)
Module layout defined: core/, agent_types/, api/, db/, hardware/, mcp/
Resource scheduling model defined with admission control
3 agent types specified: claude_cli, claude_api, shell
3 running modes specified: standalone, embedded, library
tasks.notes: Design approved by user. Includes K8s mapping table and ASCII architecture diagram.

tasks.title: Core config and data models
tasks.description: Implement CenturionConfig, ResourceSpec, ResourceRequirements in config.py

tasks.title: Legionary — individual agent instance
tasks.description: Implement Legionary class with lifecycle (idle → busy → idle), failure tracking, terminate.
acceptance_criteria: Legionary class with status tracking (LegionaryStatus enum)

tasks.title: Century — agent squad with Optio autoscaler
tasks.description: Implement Century class with PriorityQueue, worker loops, Optio autoscaler, scale_to().
acceptance_criteria: Optio autoscaler loop (scale up/down based on queue depth)

tasks.title: Legion — deployment group with quotas
tasks.description: Implement Legion class with add/remove centuries, batch distribution (round-robin/least-loaded), quota enforcement.

tasks.title: Scheduler — K8s-inspired admission control
tasks.description: Implement CenturionScheduler with hardware probing, resource allocation/release, admission control.

tasks.title: EventBus (Aquilifer) — pub-sub system
tasks.description: Implement EventBus with subscribe/emit, event history ring buffer, CenturionEvent dataclass.

tasks.title: Centurion engine — orchestrator singleton
tasks.description: Implement Centurion class: raise/disband legions, fleet_status, hardware_report, shutdown with drain.

tasks.title: Agent types — base, claude_cli, claude_api, shell, registry
tasks.description: Implement AgentType ABC, ClaudeCliAgentType, ClaudeApiAgentType, ShellAgentType, AgentTypeRegistry.
acceptance_criteria: AgentType abstract base with execute() and resource_requirements()
ShellAgentType with iTerm2 awareness on macOS
tasks.notes: All 5 files fully implemented. ~394 lines total.

tasks.title: Database layer — schema and repository
tasks.description: Implement SQLite schema (5 tables + indexes) and async repository with aiosqlite.
acceptance_criteria: 5 tables: legions, centuries, tasks, events, hardware_snapshots

tasks.title: REST API — router, schemas, websocket
tasks.description: Implement FastAPI router with 17 endpoints, Pydantic schemas, and WebSocket event streaming.
acceptance_criteria: 17 REST endpoints covering fleet, legions, centuries, tasks, legionaries, agent-types
Proper error handling with HTTP status codes

tasks.title: Hardware monitoring — probe and throttle
tasks.description: Implement hardware probe (re-export SystemResources) and resource pressure monitoring with warning/exhausted events.

tasks.title: Package setup — __init__, __main__, pyproject.toml
tasks.description: Package exports, standalone server entrypoint, and project configuration.
acceptance_criteria: __main__.py provides standalone server with CLI args

tasks.title: MCP tools — expose Centurion as MCP tools
tasks.description: Implement MCP tool definitions in centurion/mcp/tools.py following the mini-claude-bot mcp_server.py pattern. Use FastMCP to expose fleet status, legion CRUD, century CRUD, task submission, scaling, and hardware info as MCP tools that proxy to the Centurion REST API.
acceptance_criteria: Tools exposed: fleet_status, hardware_status, raise_legion, list_legions, get_legion, disband_legion
Tools exposed: add_century, get_century, scale_century, remove_century
Tools exposed: submit_task, submit_batch, get_task, cancel_task
Each tool has proper docstrings with Args descriptions
Error handling follows mini-claude-bot pattern (httpx with graceful error returns)
tasks.notes: 17 MCP tools implemented. 292 lines. Follows mini-claude-bot pattern exactly.

tasks.title: Run existing test suite and verify all pass
tasks.description: Run the full pytest suite across all 8 test files. Verify all tests pass. Report any failures.
acceptance_criteria: All tests in test_legionary.py, test_century.py, test_legion.py, test_engine.py pass
All tests in test_scheduler.py, test_agent_types.py, test_api.py, test_websocket.py pass

tasks.title: Write tests for MCP tools module
tasks.description: Write comprehensive tests for centurion/mcp/tools.py covering all MCP tool definitions.
acceptance_criteria: tests/test_mcp_tools.py exists with tests for all MCP tools
Tests mock httpx calls to verify correct API paths and parameters
Tests verify error handling (connection error, timeout, HTTP errors)
pytest tests/test_mcp_tools.py -v passes with zero failures

tasks.title: Full regression — run complete test suite
tasks.description: Run the complete test suite including the new MCP tests. Verify everything passes together.
acceptance_criteria: pytest tests/ -v --tb=short passes with zero failures
All 9 test files pass (8 existing + 1 new MCP)
No import errors or missing dependencies
tasks.notes: 154/154 tests passed. 9 test files, 61.92s. Zero failures, zero import errors.
